response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of hands-on development, including strong recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product work, MongoDB and AWS experience, Kubernetes/Docker exposure, and current AI-agent and MCP tooling work that directly matches the role's AI agent development requirement. A deep testing and TDD background (test frameworks authored, TDD/pairing/trunk-based practice) fits the quality-focused responsibilities. Gaps are mostly at the framework-specific level (no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin) rather than fundamental, so an interview is warranted.
strengths: Long full-stack track record with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS in production settings
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience, matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong engineering-quality culture: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, workshops, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed from the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are not listed among languages; Java experience appears dated
Significant time invested in niche ecosystems (DLang, Ember.js) rather than the target stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
